videos.title: Crimson Legacy
videos.type: Visual archive entry / Gothic fantasy chapter
videos.description: The visual chapter for Part I of the Crimson Legacy trilogy. The music video uses the original / legacy Crimson Legacy version. A newer 2026 audio-only version is available in the Music archive.
